query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as online_15min,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as online_1hr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as online_24hr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_7days
FROM users
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as online_15min,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as online_1hr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as online_24hr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lastSignedIn >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_7days
FROM users
